payload.description: Replace OpenSearch vector store with S3 Vectors for the prototype stack and Semantic Reinforcement Memory runtime. Scope: infrastructure migration in-place, runtime client migration, deployment, and real-world report validation. Definition of Done: prototype stack deployed with S3 Vectors, OpenSearch removed for this feature path, and full report sweep passes.
payload.title: S3 Vectors Cutover for Semantic Reinforcement Memory
